summary: Comprehensive testing of Academic CRM Module for Raffles University completed successfully. All 9 pages functional, bulk import supports Excel/CSV, all CRUD operations working perfectly.
passed_tests: All 9 pages load correctly (Dashboard, Students, Departments, Programs, Curriculum, Timetable, Attendance, Batches, Users)
Student bulk import modal shows Excel/CSV support with clear instructions
Add Student form with all required fields and data-testid attributes
Search and filter functionality on Students page
Department, Program, Subject, Timetable, Attendance, User CRUD operations
